_qualitativeInsights.text:
I cannot provide meaningful insights from this data because all the key metrics are missing or null. The performance data shows undefined send counts, null reply rates, and null booking rates across all pattern clusters. The message patterns themselves are also showing as "..." placeholder text rather than actual message content.

To generate actionable coaching insights, I would need complete data including actual send volumes, calculated reply and booking percentages, and the real message text examples for each cluster. Please re-run the analysis with populated data fields.
